ChartMage
Live demo Features GitHub
Open editor
Local-first · Mermaid · browser-only

Beautiful diagrams from a few lines of text.

Sequence and flowchart, rendered as you type. No account. No upload. Your charts stay in this browser.

Open editor Try it live
Live demo

Diagram Input and Live Preview stay in sync while you type.

Open editor
Diagram Input sequence · demo
● rendered · 5 lines Mermaid syntax
Live Preview ● rendered
— ms · Local Mermaid
Why teams like it
Storage

Saved locally by default

Your diagrams stay in localStorage, so the browser is the workspace and the source of truth.

Editing

Fast enough for thought

Keep typing in plain text while the preview updates beside you with the same Mermaid runtime as the main editor.

Sharing

Ready for export

Move from quick draft to polished diagram without losing the existing export and render contracts in the production app.

ChartMage · Forked from the original by Junlin Shang · Source
